title: pelargonium alternans subsp. longicalcar
intro: Pelargonium alternans subsp. longicalcar is a subspecies of the pelargonium alternans plant, a type of succulent that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium alternans subsp. longicalcar include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin issues.
